description: INSTALL NEW GENERATOR FOR IT SERVER ROOM ON ROOF, INCLUDING ADDITIONAL SUPPORT STRUCTURE, CONDENSING UNIT MODIFICATION AND CIRCUITRY FOR POWER PANELS SERVING IT SERVER ROOM.

This development will consist of three, separate three-story hotel occupancies on three separate lots. Buildings B & C are 9,711 SF each and Building D is 8,201 SF. All buildings will have a concrete foundation, wood framing and an exterior finish of either stucco or brick veneer. There will be a shared parking lot behind the buildings. The property is currently an atypically shaped, thru-lot with fronts on Elysian Fields Ave, Chartres St. and Royal St. The lot will be subdivided into 5 lots to facilitate this development. Buildings A and E, indicated on the drawings, are future developments and are not in this scope of work. This project is being submitted at this time for ARC/HDLC review. New construction of three (3)

This project consists of the conversion of an existing unoccupied building into 4 new short term rental units with a commercial space below. The work include's the removal of the existing partitions and stairs within. The facade plaster and windows will be rehabilitated. The entry storefront will be redesigned and a 20'-0" deep balcony will be added at the 2nd floor in keeping with the precedent at the adjacent property. A new commercial elevator and a new stair will be installed to serve egress requirements to the four rental units. Rooftop access will also be provided. The addition at the rear of the building is proposed to be extened at levels 2 & 3. The project will receive new mechanical equipment, electrical service and plumbing; the installation of a new fire alarm and sprinkler system. There is no rear yard at the ground floor.
New construction of a Bed and Breakfast
Elevate 2950 sq ft structure approximately 36" from existing height. STRUCTURAL/SHORING WORK ONLY. White box build-out under 19-28328. No use/occupancy under this permit.
